name: Curried Fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the fruits to a 2-quart casserole dish and stir.
2. In a small saucepan, melt butter. Stir in brown sugar and curry powder until well combined.
3. Pour the sauce over the fruit mixture. Allow it to stand for 1 hour.
4. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Bake for 20 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Makes 8 to 10 servings. Prep Time: 10 minutes, plus 1 hour standing time.
